headline: What Lululemon needs in its next CEO
summary: Lululemon (LULU) reported quarterly earnings results on Tuesday, disappointing investors with its weak guidance. Meanwhile, the company is still searching for its next CEO. Barclays consumer discretionary analyst Adrienne Yih sits down with Market Catalysts host Julie Hyman to discuss what Lululemon needs in its next chief executive.

content.title: What Lululemon needs in its next CEO
